why_this_action.summary: Escalated repeated measurement-hold churn into an architecture guard on the third hold-window event: the prompt repair, the re-entry contract repair, and the scheduled post-hold rerun are already in place, so future runs should suppress duplicate follow-through unless a real signal or stale packet change appears.
shared_findings_used: adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg movement is the primary success gate
outreach-log.md: avoid duplicate submission work and repeated HN/Lobsters-only handoff
market_intelligence_latest.json: reusable competitor comparisons and positioning truths
apollo_status.json: managed outbound is authenticated and available for execution packaging
targets_prepared: Reddit reddit.com › r/ai_agents › genuine question for people who have built multi-agent systems in production. how do you handle context continuity across enterprise tools? r/AI_Agents
